nasb.text: The Spirit then entered me and made me stand on my feet, and He spoke with me and said to me, “Go, shut yourself up in your house.

esv.text: But the Spirit entered into me and set me on my feet, and he spoke with me and said to me, “Go, shut yourself within your house.

cnv.text: 靈進到我裡面，使我站立起來，耶和華對我說：“你進去，把自己關在家裡。

ccb.text: 这时灵进入我里面，使我站立起来。耶和华对我说：“你要把自己关在房子里。
